docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KRISTY, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT BULL, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED FEB-21-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BULL, CHRISTOPHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF REBECCA KRISTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER BULL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRISTY, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BULL, CHRISTOPHER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
